sentences.english: Sir, I request three days of leave from you.
sentences.hindi: महोदय, मैं आपसे तीन दिन की छुट्टी की विनती करता हूँ।
sentences.pronunciation: sir i request three days of leave from you

sentences.english: I want leave because I am unwell.
sentences.hindi: मैं बीमार होने के कारण छुट्टी चाहता हूँ।
sentences.pronunciation: i want leave because i am unwell

sentences.english: Please approve my leave.
sentences.hindi: कृपया मेरी छुट्टी स्वीकृत करें।
sentences.pronunciation: please approve my leave

sentences.english: I would like to apply for this position.
sentences.hindi: मैं इस पद के लिए आवेदन करना चाहता हूँ।
sentences.pronunciation: i would like to apply for this position

sentences.english: I have sufficient experience for this job.
sentences.hindi: मेरे पास इस काम का पर्याप्त अनुभव है।
sentences.pronunciation: i have sufficient experience for this job

sentences.english: Please accept my application.
sentences.hindi: कृपया मेरा आवेदन स्वीकार करें।
sentences.pronunciation: please accept my application

sentences.english: I am applying for a transfer.
sentences.hindi: मैं स्थानांतरण के लिए आवेदन कर रहा हूँ।
sentences.pronunciation: i am applying for a transfer

sentences.english: I need to change my city because of my family.
sentences.hindi: मेरे परिवार की वजह से मुझे शहर बदलना है।
sentences.pronunciation: i need to change my city because of my family

sentences.english: I am applying for a scholarship.
sentences.hindi: मैं छात्रवृत्ति के लिए आवेदन कर रहा हूँ।
sentences.pronunciation: i am applying for a scholarship

sentences.english: My marks are sufficient for this scholarship.
sentences.hindi: मेरे अंक इस छात्रवृत्ति के लिए पर्याप्त हैं।
sentences.pronunciation: my marks are sufficient for this scholarship

sentences.english: I need a bonafide certificate.
sentences.hindi: मुझे एक बोनाफाइड प्रमाण पत्र चाहिए।
sentences.pronunciation: i need a bonafide certificate

sentences.english: I need this certificate to open a bank account.
sentences.hindi: यह प्रमाण पत्र मुझे बैंक खाता खोलने के लिए चाहिए।
sentences.pronunciation: i need this certificate to open a bank account

sentences.english: Thank you, I will wait for your prompt response.
sentences.hindi: सधन्यवाद, मैं आपकी शीघ्र प्रतिक्रिया की प्रतीक्षा करूँगा।
sentences.pronunciation: thank you i will wait for your prompt response

sentences.english: Yours sincerely.
sentences.hindi: भवदीय।
sentences.pronunciation: yours sincerely

sentences.english: I am a student of this school.
sentences.hindi: मैं इस विद्यालय का छात्र हूँ।
sentences.pronunciation: i am a student of this school

sentences.english: My roll number is twenty-five.
sentences.hindi: मेरा रोल नंबर पच्चीस है।
sentences.pronunciation: my roll number is twenty-five

sentences.english: Please approve this immediately.
sentences.hindi: कृपया इसे तुरंत स्वीकृत करें।
sentences.pronunciation: please approve this immediately

sentences.english: I hope for your positive reply.
sentences.hindi: मुझे आपके सकारात्मक जवाब की उम्मीद है।
sentences.pronunciation: i hope for your positive reply

sentences.english: This is my first application.
sentences.hindi: यह मेरा पहला आवेदन है।
sentences.pronunciation: this is my first application

sentences.english: I will be grateful for this opportunity.
sentences.hindi: मैं इस अवसर के लिए आभारी रहूँगा।
sentences.pronunciation: i will be grateful for this opportunity
